caption: A man with a light-colored hat and glasses is visible in a small video call window at the top of a computer screen. The main area of the display shows a dark background with a network map consisting of interconnected circles and lines. Several circles contain small profile images and green text, including "Emily Blending." An inset window displays a brightly lit indoor scene where people are gathered around tables in what appears to be a classroom or community space. The browser tabs at the top of the screen list titles such as "Trust & Learning by Systemyni," "Relevance by Systemyni," "Future of Society by Systemyni," and "Insights Introduction Kumu." Additionally, the address bar contains the text "blackboard.ucl.ac.uk/final-learning." The man in the video call remains relatively still, and the visual elements of the screen layout and the network map stay constant throughout the sequence.
